美股與國際市場 ·

美高院認定川普大規模關稅越權後 消費者於西雅圖集體控告亞馬遜退款Shoppers sue Amazon in Seattle after court rejects Trump IEEPA tariff push

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460980

  • 美國最高法院今年二月以六比三認定，川普運用國際緊急經濟權力法對進口大舉課徵關稅已逾越總統職權。
  • 西雅圖聯邦法院出現擬議集體訴訟，消費者主張亞馬遜在裁定前就透過漲價把關稅轉嫁，應歸還相關款項。
  • 訴狀質疑業者未及時退款並非無法可依，反而可能為維護與聯邦政府及最高層的政治關係而保留這筆錢。
  • 同類消費者訴訟先前已延伸至好市多、Nike、聯邦快遞等公司，質疑業者是否把關稅成本退給買方。
  • 訴訟引用白宮曾因「揭露關稅占比」議題對平台施壓的脈絡；亞馬遜否认曾計畫在官網拆分標示該項目。

美國最高法院認定川普大規模關稅違法並限縮總統緊急權後，西雅圖出現對亞馬遜之集體訴訟，買方主張先前被漲價吸收的關稅應退還，並質疑決策夹杂政治考量；類似案件已擴及其他零售與物流業者。

  • The U.S. Supreme Court ruled 6–3 in February that Trump’s sweeping IEEPA import tariffs exceeded presidential authority under U.S. law.
  • Consumers filed a proposed class action in Seattle federal court alleging Amazon shifted tariff burdens via higher pre-ruling retail prices owed back.
  • The complaint argues delays or refusals to rebate funds reflect political calculus with federal leadership, not a clean lack of legal basis.
  • Earlier consumer lawsuits have targeted Costco, Nike, and FedEx over whether tariff passthroughs must be refunded to shoppers.
  • The filing cites 2025 White House pressure tied to tariff price-disclosure chatter; Amazon says it never planned to label IEEPA tariffs on site.

After SCOTUS voided Trump’s IEEPA tariffs, Seattle shoppers sued Amazon alleging unrebated pass-through hikes and politics; parallels include Costco,…
